title: 2025/06/19 -TI Part 5
description: Thursday 19 June 2025 | Transport and Infrastructure Committee part 5 Public Works (Critical Infrastructure) Amendment Bill Hearing of evidence: Amokura Panoho TeTakinga New Pirirakau Tribal Authority - Incorporated (Jason Ake) Alvina Edwards John McDonald-Wharry The New Zealand Initiative (Dr Bryce Wilkinson) Infrastructure New Zealand (Michelle McCormick, Policy Director) Te Runanga o Toa Rangatira (Patrica Grace) The Law Association of New Zealand (Phil Shannan) Additional hearings for this bill can be found on 2025/06/19 Part 3 and the hearing from 2025/06/23
descriptionSummary: part 5. Public Works (Critical Infrastructure) Amendment Bill. Amokura Panoho

So my recommendation is to remove these early bonuses and replace with a transparent fair compensation process negotiated in good faith.

So in conclusion, to me, this bill accelerates infrastructure investment, but essentially, as it sits now at the cost of Maori rights and justice, I urge the committee to pause the bill, restore oral hearing rights, protect all Maori and partnership into planning.
